column3: Dong Quai's ability to regulate menstrual cycle refers to its role in helping balance hormones and improve overall reproductive health, leading to more regular periods.

Dong Quai's ability to relieve menopausal symptoms refers to its potential in easing common symptoms associated with menopause, such as hot flashes and mood changes, by promoting a state of balance within the body.
Dong Quai's ability to boost blood circulation refers to its function of enhancing the flow and delivery of oxygen-rich blood throughout the body, promoting overall health and wellness.
Dong Quai's role is to help maintain hormonal balance in the body.
Dong Quai's ability to reduce inflammation implies that this herb has properties which can help alleviate swelling and associated pain.

Dong Quai's ability to enhance fertility refers to its potential in improving reproductive health and increasing chances of conception for both men and women through tonifying Qi, the vital energy that supports various bodily functions.
Dong Quai's ability to strengthen the immune system refers to enhancing the body's defense mechanisms against various infections and illnesses.
Dong Quai's ability to support liver health refers to its positive effects on overall liver function and well-being.
Dong Quai's ability to alleviate anemia implies its potential in improving iron-deficiency blood disorder by increasing red blood cell production and boosting energy levels.
Dong Quai's ability to ease digestive issues refers to its role in improving gastrointestinal function and alleviating related discomforts.
